articles.title: Oil prices rise more than 2% as Israel moves further into Lebanon
articles.description: Oil prices rose more than 2% in early trading on Monday after Israel ordered troops to move further into Lebanon in the battle with the Iranian-backed Hezbollah militant group, despite a ceasefire...

articles.title: Scottish lottery winners hit by jackpot ‘curse’ from petrol bomb threat yob to lives ruined by cash
articles.description: Lottery scratchcard winner Jack Tanbini was slapped with a 15 month prison sentence this week.

articles.title: Robert Pape to Newsmax: Iran Has No Incentive for Quick Deal
articles.description: University of Chicago political scientist Robert Pape told Newsmax on Sunday that Iran is benefiting from instability in global energy markets and has little reason to rush into a deal with the United States while rising oil prices strengthen Tehran's negotiating leverage.

articles.title: Centre Slashes Windfall Tax On Fuel Exports
articles.description: The windfall tax was levied to increase domestic availability of the fuel amid the US-Israel and Iran war. The move of the government, however, aims at not allowing exporters to take undue advantage due to price differences as globally crude oil prices had risen since the beginning of the war

articles.title: HMRC confirms 5p per litre tax handout for petrol drivers
articles.description: HMRC has set out how the tax handout will work and how long it lasts.

articles.description: Petrol prices have just gone up and up

articles.title: E2W makers post second-best month as fuel price hikes accelerate EV shift
articles.description: Driven by a ₹7 petrol hike and flexible financing, electric two-wheeler sales surged 58% YoY in May 2026. Discover how TVS, Bajaj, and Hero MotoCorp capitalized on the massive consumer shift.

articles.title: Sikkim lifts odd-even curbs on private vehicles across state, retains restrictions in Gangtok
articles.description: Gangtok, May 31 (PTI) The Sikkim government on Sunday withdrew the odd-even restriction on the movement of private vehicles across the state, except within Gangtok town, according to an official notification. The decision was taken after the Food and Civil Supplies Department informed a review meeting that sufficient buffer stocks of petrol and diesel had […]

articles.title: After petrol and diesel, will LPG and PNG prices go up? What do oil companies say? Explained in detail
articles.description: Over the past month, there have been repeated price hikes across petrol, diesel, and CNG. Consequently, consumers are gripped by the fear that oil companies might once again raise cylinder prices on June 1st. - After petrol and diesel, will LPG and PNG prices go up? articles.title: How many Tiago buyers choose electric? We asked Tata Motors MD & CEO Shailesh Chandra
articles.description: The Tiago remains one of the few mass-market cars in India where buyers are embracing all three powertrain options, be it petrol, CNG or electric, in meaningful numbers.
